# Introduction

## What is reproducibility?

In a nutshell, reproducibility means that someone else (including your future self) can recreate the results of a data analysis.


- Definition of the Turing Way
- Reproducibility vs. replication
- Add callout box with varying definitions of reproducibility 

### Levels of reproducibility

- Reproducibility as a scale
- Which level of reproducibility is sufficient?
- https://doi.org/10.1126/science.1213847

## Reproducibility in science

- State of reproducibility in science
- Reproducibility per discipline

Ask yourself: How trustworthy do you think 

- Trust in science
-
